queued_families.definition: Identify and list recurrence of each unique POI and each POI layer, including single unique locations and grouped locations from one or more ILAP layers.
queued_families.implementation_rule: Do not implement as a visual detector. Implement as an aggregation and recurrence module after registry, export mapping, and infrastructure context are established.

queued_families.definition: Queue SHAG/TAP as a controlled ILAP Target Location Type subfamily for visual candidate access-control microclusters. SHAG means Small House And Gate; TAP means Target Access Point.
queued_families.interpretation_rule: Visual candidate only. SHAG/TAP labels identify observable access-control pattern components and do not prove function or restricted access.
queued_families.implementation_rule: Map to the POI recurrence queue and implement later through fr24_poi_recurrence.py and fr24_infrastructure_context.py after registry contracts, enum registry, QC, and export sidecar controls exist.
